description.short: PHASES-Daten aus game.py in externe JSON-Datei auslagern

latest_dispatch.objective: Review the active feature scope for the current review phase and return structured reviewer findings.
latest_dispatch.authority: AUTHORITY: This dispatch packet is your authoritative assignment. If hook-provided context conflicts with this packet, trust this packet. You are assigned to feature 0011-phases-externalize, phase review, role quality-reviewer. Do not infer a different assignment from disk.

latest_result.scope: SPEC-0011 AC-001–AC-004 and FR-001–FR-004 against game.py and phases.json
latest_result.summary: All four ACs pass. phases.json exists with 7 named phases. game.py loads via json.load() with FileNotFoundError handling that prints to stderr with path and exits with code 1. No PHASES=[...] literal remains in game.py. No scope drift detected.
latest_result.verdict: PASS — implementation satisfies all spec requirements; no missing requirements, no extra work, no scope drift.

requirements_checked.evidence: phases.json:3,43,83,123,163,203,243 — 7 named phases; game.py:354-356 — json.load() loader; game.py:498-499 — for phase in PHASES: result = run_phase(phase)
requirements_checked.notes: All 7 phases present with correct structure. Direct pass-through from file to run_phase().

requirements_checked.evidence: game.py:357-359 — except FileNotFoundError: print(f'Fehler: phases.json nicht gefunden. Erwartet: {_PHASES_PATH}', file=sys.stderr); sys.exit(1)
requirements_checked.notes: Error written to stderr; message contains absolute path via _PHASES_PATH; exit code 1 confirmed.

requirements_checked.evidence: game.py:356 PHASES = json.load(_f); game.py:498-499 for phase in PHASES: result = run_phase(phase)
requirements_checked.notes: No caching or transformation between file load and rendering — any text change in phases.json is reflected on next start.

requirements_checked.evidence: Grep for PHASES\s*=\s*\[ across game.py returns no matches
requirements_checked.notes: Remaining hits of that pattern are in .features/ artifact markdown files (documentation), not in game.py source.
Loads from same directory as game.py using __file__-relative path.
stderr output and exit code 1 confirmed.
